options.A: Investment chips off when molten metal enters the mold space

While some sources mention brittleness or mechanical issues related to certain materials, none directly link carbon impurities in phosphate investment to casting defects observed clinically—black discoloration is specifically documented as resulting from incompatible chemistry involving phosphates and carbon.
Answer: B
